description: A photograph depicting a greenhouse structure covered in a beige or tan plastic sheeting, extending upwards towards a blue sky with faint white clouds. The image captures the side and roof of the structure, showing the translucent plastic material and underlying framework. The photograph is credited to "© Eurostat LUCAS 2009". The surrounding document context identifies this as a "Greenhouses structure in Almeria (Andalusia, Spain)" and refers to CLMS (Copernicus Land Monitoring Service) land cover class "2.1.2.0 Greenhouses".
